description: Envelope for all WebSocket messages between backend and browser

payload.description: Message body — schema depends on type field

connection_status_payload.description: Broadcast when drone connection state changes

mission_update_payload.description: Current state of the mission queue, broadcast on any change

active_poi_index.description: Which POI the drone is currently at

video_signal_payload.description: WebRTC signaling messages forwarded between drone-agent and browser

data.description: Raw WebRTC SDP or ICE candidate object

copilot_request_payload.description: Natural language input from the operator

session_id.description: Browser session ID for conversation continuity

copilot_response_payload.description: Claude's response — either an answer, a clarifying question, or a confirmation prompt

text.description: Human-readable response to display in the copilot bar

pending_command.description: Present when response_type is confirmation_required — the command awaiting approval
